scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points from gold standard: type field, description field, container linking with resource field. Also correctly notes filename for file type. Missing mention of upstream-source field but that's minor.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'Uploading an OCI Image Resource' section with charmcraft upload-resource CLI details and --image flag specifics (short/long digest forms, Canonical Registry behavior) go beyond the gold standard. These details may be real but cannot be verified against the gold standard, and the specific behavior description (checking Canonical's Registry, pulling from local Docker daemon) could be inaccurate or fabricated details.
